Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY

BUDT741 Digital Health (2 Credits) Healthcare is perhaps the latest industry to use technology to innovate and automate its business processes. The focus of the course is to provide a deep understanding to the current and emerging technologies in the healthcare industry. The course will also discuss the vagaries of healthcare data and the analytics techniques that are speciﬁc to the healthcare industry. Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H Smith. Credit Only Granted for: BUDT758M or BUDT741. Formerly: BUDT758M.

BUDT742 Machine Learning & Blockchain for FinTech (2 Credits) Machine Learning is rapidly changing the ﬁnancial services industries and Blockchain is poised to make fundamental changes to how the ﬁnancial sector is structured and organized. The focus of the course is to provide a deep understanding for the current machine learning and emerging Blockchain technologies in the ﬁnancial services industry. Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H Smith. Credit Only Granted for: BUDT758I or BUDT742. Formerly: BUDT758I.
